title: narcissus poeticus var. angustifolius
intro: Narcissus poeticus var. angustifolius, also known as the narrow-leaved poetic daffodil, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Narcissus poeticus var. angustifolius include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as a natural expectorant. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or ointments, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
